title: garcinia pedicellata
intro: Garcinia pedicellata is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the Garcinia family. This plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Garcinia pedicellata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in traditional medicine, and its herbal preparations may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are typically prepared from the leaves, bark, or roots of the plant.
